provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official course-list PDF dated 15 September 2025 publishes 26 courses with confirmed codes, titles and curriculum groups. It publishes credit points only as group or pathway totals, not as per-course values, and does not publish a recommended year/semester study pattern; per-course credits, recommendedYear and semester are therefore intentionally left unknown. Five Major Core courses, SSC3316, INS3068 and GGP2033 are marked as required for Year 1 Admissions only. Cross-Faculty Core Course Component III has no course code or fixed title and is intentionally omitted rather than assigned an invented course. The programme page confirms 121 cps for Year 1 Admissions and 60 cps for Senior Year Admissions, but this supplement does not allocate those totals to individual courses or assert graduation completion.
